AGIEval (Chinese-subject portion) score of 64.37 for ERNIE (Wenxin) 3.5, vs. ChatGPT 40.27 and GPT-4 56.96, as announced by Baidu around its June 2023 ERNIE 3.5 upgrade. Sourced from Science Net (中国科学报, hosted by the Chinese Academy of Sciences), which reports the exact figures; corroborated by contemporaneous CNBC and Coinspeaker coverage of the same Baidu claim ('Ernie 3.5 achieved higher scores than other large models, including ChatGPT, and surpassed GPT-4' on AGIEval/C-Eval). Labeled self-reported since it is Baidu's own claimed test result relayed by press, not an independent third-party re-run. Model had 0 tracked results before this.
